stages.name: Repo Context Discovery
stages.description: Generate deterministic repo context (discovery + optional baseline)

stages.name: Validation Phase
stages.description: Test and validate the maintenance changes

stages.name: Synthesis Phase
stages.description: Merge outputs into a cohesive maintenance plan

stages.name: Decision Phase
stages.description: Evaluate business value and approve next steps

stages.name: PR Publication
stages.description: Create maintenance branch and open/update PR with evidence

stages.name: Quality Phase
stages.description: Score the run and extract learnings

stages.name: Memory Capsule
stages.description: Capture a durable run summary for reuse
